description: A thin pointed piece of metal used in sewing; the tool that draws thread through fabric. 'Tisu' names what pierces and joins—the fine point that creates connection.
sound_symbolism: The word pierces precise. 'Ti' points with fine accuracy, needle entering. Then 'su' slides through smoothly, thread following.
grammatical_notes: Functions as noun: 'lo tisu' (the needle). Used with 'sima' (thread) for sewing. Ancient technology enabling all textile work.

pillars.pre-industrial-wisdom: The needle as civilization—tiny tool enabling clothing, shelter, medicine, art.
pillars.secular-buddhist-philosophy: Precision without force—the needle parts fabric gently, creating without destroying.
